en: I don't want your germs around me.
ko: 내 주변에 너의 세균은 원하지 않아.

en: Wait, you hold my hand, you kiss my mouth,
ko: 잠깐, 너는 내 손을 잡고, 내 입에 키스하지만,

en: but you draw the line at 102 fever?
What happened to our love?
Sheldon, are you okay?
What's going on?
How'd I get here?
ko: 내가 여기 어떻게 오게 된 거지?

en: I don't know, we came home from work and we found you.
ko: 잘 모르겠어, 우리는 일에서 집에 돌아왔고 너를 찾았어.

en: Home from work? What time is it?
It's nine o'clock.
Nine o'clock?
What happened to eight and seven and all the other o'clocks?
ko: 여덟 시, 일곱 시, 그리고 다른 모든 시각은 어디 갔어?

en: You don't remember?
Well, I remember waking up in the morning,
Amy rubbing Vicks on my chest,
and her hands were like two frozen chunks of tundra.
ko: 그녀의 손은 얼어붙은 툰드라처럼 두 덩어리였어.

en: I took some cold medicine to...
Oh!
I took cold medicine.
You did seem a little loopy
ko: 네가 연구소에 나타났을 때 좀 이상해 보였어.

en: when you showed up at the lab.
At the lab?
Why am I naked from the waist down?
